text:
Nano Banana 2 Lite is a real game changer

Generating character images in SECONDS rather than MINUTES means I'm able to create variants of characters so much quicker.

I was able to generated this entirely new character for my streets of rage game using Spriterrific. https://t.co/memTAnVaLY
